steps.title: Find the yearly deposits
steps.content:
Priya deposits $x$ dollars once each month for $12$ months, giving $12x$. She deposits $y$ dollars twice each month for $12$ months, giving:
$$12\cdot2y=24y$$

steps.title: Set the total
steps.content:
The total amount deposited last year was $7{,}200$, so the equation is:
$$7{,}200=12x+24y$$
The answer is B.
